title: Use DMB package key nomenclature
description: Rule for appsettings keys, user secrets, and environment variable names.
contextText:
DMB package configuration keys must use the logical form DMB:{Package}:{Section}:{Name}.
Environment variables must replace each ':' with '__', for example DMB:Stripe:SecretKey becomes DMB__Stripe__SecretKey.
Keep secret keys and non-secret runtime settings in the same DMB:{Package}:... namespace when they belong to the same feature.
Do not introduce new package variables under implementation class names when a DMB:{Package}:... key exists or can be introduced.
